## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactor/maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested the change locally
- [ ] I ran `npm run build:lib`
- [ ] I ran `npm run build-storybook`
- [ ] I updated docs/stories when needed
- [ ] I kept this PR focused and minimal

## Screenshots or Storybook Links

If UI behavior changed, include screenshots or Storybook links.

## Related Issues

Link related issues (for example: `Closes #123`).
